title: Version 1: Major cookbook foundation
scope: All major public-domain cookbook pie recipes published through 1928.
deliverables: recipes.csv/json; recipe_families.csv/json; source manifest; deduplication rules; searchable website data exports; PDF cookbook-ready dataset

title: Version 2: Cookbooks + magazines
deliverables: magazine issue manifest; magazine recipe harvest candidates; ingredient frequency analysis; recipe family pages

title: Version 3: Add newspapers
scope: Rev2 plus reviewed public-domain newspaper recipes.
deliverables: Chronicling America harvest workflow; newspaper candidate review queue; regional map data; reprint tracking

title: Version 4: Complete public-domain archive through 1928
scope: Complete public-domain archive through 1928 including cookbooks, magazines, newspapers, community/church cookbooks, and USDA/extension publications.
deliverables: 10,000+ recipe records; complete recipe-family deduplication; API-ready JSON; research citation exports; regional and timeline visualizations
